goal: Make Claude reliably create intent records on every commit without manual reminding
approach: Strengthened the injected CLAUDE.md prompt: added REQUIRED header, IMPORTANT block saying no exceptions, reworded steps to be explicit and imperative (BEFORE running git commit), numbered steps more clearly including staging the intent file explicitly.

alternatives.option: Add a pre-commit hook that blocks commits without intents
alternatives.rejected_because: Would break non-Claude workflows and manual commits

alternatives.option: Make the PostToolUse hook auto-generate intents
alternatives.rejected_because: Hook can't know the goal/approach — only Claude has that context
